creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 163465
update games/uhexen2-extras

This is a collection of optional extras for Hexen2 which was marked BROKEN in whole due to one file being unfetchable. That file went missing because there is a new version with lit data for 5 more maps. The patch updates the port to restore fetchability and also quiets a portlint warning. Since there is no clear version on the extra data, this port's version was updated to match the main uhexen2 port's version.
